title: The Empty Envelope
desc: Five mysterious blue envelopes — and one hides a $50,000 stamp. ✉️

q.en: Who receives the mysterious blue envelopes at the beginning of the story?
q.zh: 故事一开始，是谁收到了那些神秘的深蓝色信封？

options.zh: 乔什
奈特
丁克（唐纳德·邓肯）

options.en: Ruth Rose according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 露丝·罗丝（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Dink finds five blue envelopes in his mailbox, addressed to D. Duncan.
explain.zh: 丁克在自家信箱里发现了五个深蓝色信封，收件人写的是 D. 邓肯。

q.en: What clue showed that Nate had taken the envelopes from Dink's kitchen?
q.zh: 什么线索表明是奈特从丁克家的厨房拿走了信封？

options.zh: 紫色的葡萄果酱指纹
留下的一只恐龙玩具

options.en: A note in Nate's handwriting according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一张奈特手写的纸条（按书中另一种说法）
泥泞的鞋印

explain.en: Ruth Rose noticed a small purple hand print made of grape jam on the kitchen table.
explain.zh: 露丝·罗丝在厨房桌上发现了一个用葡萄果酱留下的紫色小手印。

q.en: Where did Nate hide the blue envelopes?
q.zh: 奈特把那些深蓝色信封藏在哪里了？

options.zh: 藏在床底下
藏在信箱里

options.en: Behind the TV according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 藏在电视机后面（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: In the refrigerator with his stuffed dinosaur Steggy
options.zh: 藏在冰箱里，和他那只名叫斯特吉的毛绒恐龙在一起

explain.en: Nate's stuffed stegosaurus 'Steggy' was holding the five envelopes inside the fridge.
explain.zh: 奈特的毛绒剑龙‘斯特吉’在冰箱里叼着那五个信封。

q.en: What secret message did the tiny pinholes in the letters spell?
q.zh: 信纸上那些小小的针孔拼出了什么秘密信息？

options.en: Mother loves Doris always according to some versions of the story
options.zh: Mother loves Doris always（妈妈永远爱多丽丝）（按书中另一种说法）
Jenny hidden on fifth envelope（珍妮藏在第五个信封上）
Follow the green car（跟着绿色的车）
Money is in the bank（钱在银行里）

explain.en: The holes went through the letters J, H, D, O, F, E and the word 'envelope,' reading 'Jenny hidden on fifth envelope.'
explain.zh: 针孔穿过 J、H、D、O、F、E 以及‘envelope’（信封）这个词，连起来就是‘珍妮藏在第五个信封上’。

q.en: What valuable thing was hidden under the sunflower stamps on the fifth (empty) envelope?
q.zh: 在第五个（空的）信封上，向日葵邮票下面藏着什么值钱的东西？

options.en: A winning lottery ticket according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一张中奖的彩票（按书中另一种说法）
一枚钻戒
一枚金币

options.en: A rare upside-down airplane stamp worth $50,000
options.zh: 一张印反了的稀有飞机邮票，价值五万美元

explain.en: It was a Curtis Jenny 'invert' stamp showing an airplane printed upside down, worth $50,000.
explain.zh: 那是一张‘柯蒂斯·珍妮’错体邮票，飞机图案印反了，价值五万美元。

q.en: How did the kids get the sunflower stamps off the envelope to see what was underneath?
q.zh: 孩子们是怎么把向日葵邮票从信封上取下来，看清下面的东西的？

options.en: They steamed them off with a kettle
options.zh: 他们用烧水壶的蒸汽把邮票熏下来
他们把信封剪开

options.en: They peeled them off with glue
options.zh: 他们用胶水把邮票揭下来

options.en: They washed them off in the sink according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他们在水槽里把它们洗下来（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Ruth Rose held the envelope over the steaming kettle spout until the stamps peeled away.
explain.zh: 露丝·罗丝把信封放在冒蒸汽的水壶嘴上方，邮票就慢慢脱落了。

q.en: According to the newspaper, whose rare stamp had been stolen?
q.zh: 根据报纸上的报道，那张稀有邮票是谁失窃的？

options.en: Dink's mother according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 丁克的妈妈（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: Clementine Painter, who found it in her vacuum cleaner
options.zh: 克莱门汀·佩因特，她在吸尘器里发现了这张邮票
法伦警官
图书馆

explain.en: Miss Clementine Painter, 73, found the stamp in her vacuum cleaner dust, then it was stolen.
explain.zh: 73岁的克莱门汀·佩因特女士在吸尘器的灰尘里发现了这张邮票，后来它被偷走了。

q.en: Why did the letters end up in Connecticut instead of Colorado?
q.zh: 为什么这些信最后送到了康涅狄格州，而不是科罗拉多州？

options.en: The post office made a mistake
options.zh: 邮局弄错了

options.en: Ruth Rose changed the address according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 露丝·罗丝改了地址（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Otto Bird wrote the wrong zip code because he had broken his glasses
options.zh: 奥托·伯德眼镜摔坏了，写错了邮编
丁克给了错误的地址

explain.en: Otto Bird broke his glasses and copied the zip code for Green Lawn, Connecticut instead of Colorado.
explain.zh: 奥托·伯德眼镜摔坏了，把科罗拉多州格林劳恩的邮编写成了康涅狄格州格林劳恩的邮编。

q.en: How did Ruth Rose help catch the thieves?
q.zh: 露丝·罗丝是怎么帮助抓住小偷的？

options.zh: 她跑到酒店去

options.en: She pretended to be a crook and set up a meeting at the library
options.zh: 她假装成小偷，约对方在图书馆见面
她藏在谷仓里

options.en: She called the newspaper according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 她打电话给报社（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Ruth Rose phoned Doris pretending to sell the stamp, luring Doris and Otto to the library where Officer Fallon waited.
explain.zh: 露丝·罗丝打电话给多丽丝，假装要卖邮票，把多丽丝和奥托引到图书馆，法伦警官在那里守候。

q.en: Who was the short man in the green suit and purple tie who followed the kids?
q.zh: 那个穿着绿色西装、打着紫色领带、跟踪孩子们的矮个子男人是谁？

options.en: Otto Bird, Doris's partner in the theft
options.zh: 奥托·伯德，多丽丝偷邮票的同伙
丁克的爸爸

options.en: The mail carrier Ruby according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 邮差鲁比（按书中另一种说法）
法伦警官

explain.en: It was Otto Bird, the 'associate' of Doris Duncan and the one who originally stole the stamp.
explain.zh: 那是奥托·伯德，他是多丽丝·邓肯的同伙，也是最初偷走邮票的人。
